name: Keith Ellison
subject: Derek, we can win with you on our side.
body:
Let's start November with momentum on our side.
---
**Pitch in $3 or whatever you can before tomorrow's end-of-month deadline to help Democrats win in every state.

** **[DONATE](http://my.democrats.org/page/m/40523af5/4067b0a/46c5c01d0/7e67ced6/3490429109/VEsH/ "https://my.democrats.org/October-Deadline-AB?utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=1+-+DONATE&utm_campaign=em_20171030_ke_nd&source=em_20171030_ke_nd&refcode=em_20171030_ke_nd")**

Derek --

We have no time to waste. In just eight days, Democrats in Virginia will head to the polls to cast their votes in their statewide elections. Just five weeks later, we'll have a chance to turn a Republican U.S. Senate seat blue in the Alabama special election by electing Doug Jones. And then 2018 is right around the corner, when it's all hands on deck to take back Congress.

**[That's why we need your help, Derek.](http://my.democrats.org/page/m/40523af5/4067b0a/46c5c01d0/7e67ced7/3490429109/VEsE/ "https://my.democrats.org/October-Deadline-AB?utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=2+-+Thats+why+we+need+your+helpCUSTOMDATASET&utm_campaign=em_20171030_ke_nd&source=em_20171030_ke_nd&refcode=em_20171030_ke_nd")**

It's been nearly a year since Donald Trump was elected president. In that time, his administration and congressional Republicans have been doing everything they can to sabotage our health care system, undermine environmental protections put in place by President Obama, and hand out tax cuts to millionaires and corporations.

But with every step they've taken to try to undermine our progress, you and millions of other grassroots supporters have made your voices heard -- marching in the streets, calling your representatives, and organizing to make sure Republicans feel real pressure.

I can tell you first hand that it's working. Now we just have to keep it up and make Trump and Republicans pay at the ballot box by electing Democrats running for office all across the country.

I'm asking for your help to make sure we have the support and resources we need to make it happen.

Pitch in $3 or whatever you can before our October fundraising deadline and commit to electing Democrats this year, in 2018, and beyond.

**If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately.

[ QUICK DONATE: $3](http://my.democrats.org/page/m/40523af5/4067b0a/46c5c01d0/7e67ced4/3490429109/VEsF/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/october-deadline-2017?express_lane=true&amount=3&utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=3+-+QUICK+DONATE+3&utm_campaign=em_20171030_ke_nd&source=em_20171030_ke_nd&refcode=em_20171030_ke_nd")
[QUICK DONATE: $10](http://my.democrats.org/page/m/40523af5/4067b0a/46c5c01d0/7e67ced5/3490429109/VEsC/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/october-deadline-2017?express_lane=true&amount=10&utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=4+-+QUICK+DONATE+10&utm_campaign=em_20171030_ke_nd&source=em_20171030_ke_nd&refcode=em_20171030_ke_nd")
[QUICK DONATE: $25](http://my.democrats.org/page/m/40523af5/4067b0a/46c5c01d0/7e67ced2/3490429109/VEsD/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/october-deadline-2017?express_lane=true&amount=25&utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=5+-+QUICK+DONATE+25&utm_campaign=em_20171030_ke_nd&source=em_20171030_ke_nd&refcode=em_20171030_ke_nd")
[QUICK DONATE: $50](http://my.democrats.org/page/m/40523af5/4067b0a/46c5c01d0/7e67ced3/3490429109/VEsA/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/october-deadline-2017?express_lane=true&amount=50&utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=6+-+QUICK+DONATE+50&utm_campaign=em_20171030_ke_nd&source=em_20171030_ke_nd&refcode=em_20171030_ke_nd")

[Or donate another amount.](http://my.democrats.org/page/m/40523af5/4067b0a/46c5c01d0/7e67ced1/3490429109/VEsO/ "https://my.democrats.org/October-Deadline-AB?utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=8+-+Or+donate+another+amount&utm_campaign=em_20171030_ke_nd&source=em_20171030_ke_nd&refcode=em_20171030_ke_nd")

Keith

Our email list is the best way we have of staying in regular contact with supporters like you across the country and letting you know about the work Democrats are doing. If you like staying in touch, but want to receive only the most important messages, click [here](http://my.democrats.org/page/m/40523af5/4067b0a/46c5c01d0/7e67cedf/3490429109/VEsHBQ/ "https://my.democrats.org/page/signup/less-email?utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=10+-+here&utm_campaign=em_20171030_ke_nd&source=em_20171030_ke_nd&refcode=em_20171030_ke_nd"). Click [here](http://my.democrats.org/page/m/40523af5/4067b0a/46c5c01d0/7e67cedc/3490429109/VEsHBA/ "http://www.democrats.org/unsubscribe?utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=11+-+here&utm_campaign=em_20171030_ke_nd&source=em_20171030_ke_nd&refcode=em_20171030_ke_nd") to unsubscribe from our supporter list, but if you leave, it will be harder for you to stay involved in the organization that you've been such a critical part of. This organization is powered by you, and we'd love to hear your ideas. Send us any comments, criticisms, or feedback [here](http://my.democrats.org/page/m/40523af5/4067b0a/46c5c01d0/7e67cedd/3490429109/VEsHBw/ "http://my.democrats.org/page/s/contact-the-democrats?utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=12+-+here&utm_campaign=em_20171030_ke_nd&source=em_20171030_ke_nd&refcode=em_20171030_ke_nd"), or just reply to this email! Thanks for supporting our party.

name: The White House
subject: An Economy That Works For Hardworking Americans
body:
1600 Daily
https://click.mail.whitehouse.gov/?qs=2eb80ecb6c4f4483042d8e9bd12311ff54208194b6b18a55b9f62fd1e349926ffaab9bbd8bcdadc3a970b867dcd76320ee377451948b3c7e

Under the current tax code’s uncompetitive corporate tax rates, wage growth stagnates. Hardworking Americans don’t experience the wage growth they should. But fixing our broken tax code can help make our economy more productive and more profitable. Read more about the Unified Framework for Tax Reform supported by President Donald J. Trump
https://click.mail.whitehouse.gov/?qs=2eb80ecb6c4f448337eddf4af73a52a58757a730c349cf75093482d8a1fa59aefeaa1e9d4186a5556aec18f330e50f914b2f9df0faea209d
here.

-----------------

Kick-Starting the American Economy into High Gear

There’s a disconnect between America’s corporate profits and America’s real wages. On Friday, the Council of Economic Advisers released a report on the relationship between the corporate tax rate and gross domestic product (GDP). GDP growth has stalled below its post-World War II average (about 3 percent) for the last decade. Improving our tax policies, such as cutting corporate taxes and allowing capital investments to be written off, will jumpstart America's economic engine.

See the full report
https://click.mail.whitehouse.gov/?qs=2eb80ecb6c4f4483538ce638468dc5f4e7ae8c11fc337eea8dc143b04939a40b381e24a8bb61c819b14877ae658010db885f2cfc2c90f566
here.

President Trump Takes Action Against the Nation's Opioid Crisis

Last week, President Trump continued the mobilization of his Administration to address drug addiction by directing the declaration of a Nationwide Public Health Emergency to address the opioids crisis. The action allows for expanded access to telemedicine services, including services involving remote prescribing of medicine commonly used for substance abuse or mental health treatment.
In 2016, more than two million Americans had an addiction to prescription or illicit opioids. This directive will help states and local communities better fight this battle, and strengthen the tools available at the federal level, ensuring people have access to the help they desperately need, and deserve.

See more
https://click.mail.whitehouse.gov/?qs=2eb80ecb6c4f4483daf43edf6dd673644b6bd5a6b78b5482f3af3daef36abab523dbf3d33a235f55a6a941076183386ad0d53c5d4a12d43c
here.

Vice President Pence Delivers Remarks at Minot Air Force Base
On Friday, Vice President Pence gave remarks to Airmen at Minot Air Force Base in North Dakota. He expressed gratitude on behalf of the President and citizens of the United States for their service to our Nation, and dedication to defend our freedom and way of life. The Vice President also reassured the Administration's commitment to strengthening the United States’ Armed Forces, proclaiming that the era of budget cuts to the American military has ended.

“Our President has already signed the largest increase in defense spending in nearly 10 years. And as we speak, we're working with the Congress to pass the largest investment in our national defense since the days of Ronald Reagan. Under this Commander-in-Chief, the era of budget cuts to the American military are over,” Vice President Pence said.

Read the Vice President's full remarks
https://click.mail.whitehouse.gov/?qs=2eb80ecb6c4f44831e265dfd72205e6b1756d50faeed7a0ad800101af7de6dbaa9b1f33ee672091f3a436aeade44df5d81ee8f0c74f62e2a
here.

Photo of the Day

President Donald J. Trump and First Lady Melania Trump deliver remarks on combatting drug demand and the opioid crisis | October 26, 2017 (Official White House Photo by Andrea Hanks)

POTUS TODAY

This morning, the President Trump will receive his daily intelligence briefing, followed by a meeting with Secretary of State Rex Tillerson. In the afternoon, the President will have lunch with Vice President Mike Pence and Attorney General Jeff Sessions. Later, the President will meet with Secretary of the Defense James Mattis.

The Vice President will participate in a swearing-in ceremony for Steve King as U.S. Ambassador to the Czech Republic.

This evening, the White House will welcome local students, military families, and community groups for an afternoon of Halloween festivities on the South Lawn. President Trump and First Lady Melania Trump will hand out cookies created by the White House Pastry Kitchen, and various departments and agencies such as the United States Secret Service, National Aeronautics and Space Administration, Federal Emergency Management Agency, National Park Service, and the Department of Education will also be on hand to give out various items and participate in the festivities. Watch live
https://click.mail.whitehouse.gov/?qs=2eb80ecb6c4f4483576af39d941d23cab0975e1c9542850bfc3a7a4a6c49b01fbee9a21e3b2319cbb8e1677833c5892e4cb37a4b56bbf0df
here at 5:45 ET.

COMING UP

On Friday, President Trump departs on a 10-day trip to Asia, his fourth international trip as President. The President will participate in a series of bilateral, multilateral, and cultural engagements demonstrating his continued commitment to the alliances and partnerships of the United States in the region, and strengthening international commitment to the denuclearization of North Korea.

https://click.mail.whitehouse.gov/?qs=2eb80ecb6c4f4483e06e8ef55040ddb5ab8ef97058524e504624bd86c02d47056a72a2d6a77c1fd0985cefc3f04271f33107f729153be934
Privacy Policy |

Contact the White House |

In the afternoon, the President will have lunch with Vice President Mike Pence and Attorney General Jeff Sessions. Later, the President will meet with Secretary of the Defense James Mattis. The Vice President will participate in a swearing-in ceremony for Steve King as U.S. Ambassador to the Czech Republic. This evening, the White House will welcome local students, military families, and community groups for an afternoon of Halloween festivities on the South Lawn. President Trump and First Lady Melania Trump will hand out cookies created by the White House Pastry Kitchen, and various departments and agencies such as the United States Secret Service, National Aeronautics and Space Administration, Federal Emergency Management Agency, National Park Service, and the Department of Education will also be on hand to give out various items and participate in the festivities. Watch live here at 5:45 ET. COMING UP On Friday, President Trump departs on a 10-day trip to Asia, his fourth international trip as President. The President will participate in a series of bilateral, multilateral, and cultural engagements demonstrating his continued commitment to the alliances and partnerships of the United States in the region, and strengthening international commitment to the denuclearization of North Korea.

Peter,

Election Day is NEXT WEEK!

Next Tuesday, 53 EMILY's List candidates will be on ballots all across the country for everything from lieutenant governor to state house to mayor.

Every one of these elections is key to protecting our rights at the state and local level and resisting the Trump administration.

**[Donate $3 to help reach our $125,000 End-of-Month goal by tomorrow to support these key campaigns and help our women win on Election Day.](https://secure.emilyslist.org/page/m/118c63a9/24c69fd9/17817072f/189ff7e3/3824087405/VEsE/ "https://secure.emilyslist.org/page/contribute/20171028_email_OctoberEOM?utm_medium=email&utm_source=emilyslist&utm_content=2+-+Donate+3+to+help+reach+our+125000+EndofM&utm_campaign=WQEFEJ64N_digital_email_20171030_EOMNov7Elections_inact&source=WQEFEJ64N_digital_email_20171030_EOMNov7Elections_inact")**

After President Trump's win in 2016, droves of women turned out to take action and fight back. Since then, more than 20,000 have reached out to us about running for office.

We're already seeing the effects.

We've endorsed 16 women running for the Virginia House of Delegates -- and their wins will be key to Democrats flipping the chamber. And there are even more women on the ticket in Georgia, Massachusetts, Michigan, Minnesota, Missouri, New Hampshire, New Jersey, New York, North Carolina, Ohio, Pennsylvania, and Washington State.

That's a long, powerful list, and we're so proud of it.

Our women work hard: They have been putting their names on the ballot, reaching out to their communities, and weathering attacks from their opponents (some of them PARTICULARLY nasty).

Now it's time we help them WIN on November 7th.

**Donate $3 to help meet our $125,000 End-of-Month goal and help all of our women win next week and in all the elections to come:**

**[https://secure.emilyslist.org/Hit-Our-October-Goal](https://secure.emilyslist.org/page/m/118c63a9/24c69fd9/17817072f/189ff61c/3824087405/VEsF/ "https://secure.emilyslist.org/page/contribute/20171028_email_OctoberEOM?utm_medium=email&utm_source=emilyslist&utm_content=3+-+httpssecureemilyslistorgHitOurOctoberGoa&utm_campaign=WQEFEJ64N_digital_email_20171030_EOMNov7Elections_inact&source=WQEFEJ64N_digital_email_20171030_EOMNov7Elections_inact")**

Thank you -- and go team!

Emily Cain

name: Elizabeth Warren
subject: "ripoff clauses"
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the DSCC, dscc
body:
Last week, Senate Republicans voted to overturn a new rule that protects your right to take big banks to court. Fight back >>
---
**[](http://action.dscc. "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/dscc-ewarren?refcode=DPE-20171030-Warren-ProsHV&recurring=auto&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&addr1= &city=&state=&zip=&phone=&employer=&occupation=&amounts=5,10,25,50,100,150,250&amount=5")**
Team,

Last week, Senate Republicans voted to overturn the Consumer Financial Protection Bureau's new rule that protects your right to take big banks and financial institutions like Wells Fargo and Equifax to court when they cheat you.

We worked our hearts out seven years ago to create an agency that would get the tricks and traps out of financial products and level the playing field for working families. But now, Senate Republicans are gutting the CFPB and weakening essential consumer protections.

[**Contribute $1 now to hold Republicans accountable for their late night vote to put big banks ahead of working families.**](http://action.dscc. "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/dscc-ewarren?refcode=DPE-20171030-Warren-ProsHV&recurring=auto&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&addr1= &city=&state=&zip=&phone=&employer=&occupation=&amounts=5,10,25,50,100,150,250&amount=5")

If you have a checking account, a credit card, or a student loan, you've probably signed a very long contract with a bunch of gibberish that you didn't bother to read.

(It's ok, I was a contract law professor for many years, and I've done it, too.)

Hidden in the fine print of many of those contracts is a forced arbitration clause. That's a fancy way of saying that you signed away your right to join together in court in a class action lawsuit to challenge big companies when they break the law.

I call these forced arbitration clauses "ripoff clauses," and for good reason. If a bank unfairly charges you $10, you're most likely not going to spend the time and money challenging them all on your own through an industry-friendly arbitration process. So if a bank sneaks that small fee in millions of people's bills, they can create ginormous profits for themselves -- with little accountability from their customers.

By prohibiting forced arbitration clauses, the CFPB made huge progress in stopping companies from tricking, misleading, and flat out cheating their customers. But then the big financial institutions spent millions of dollars on lawyers, lobbyists, and slick PR campaigns to get their Republican pals in Congress to reverse this policy.

That's millions of dollars on top of the big bucks that they're already spending to repeal the rules we put in place after the 2008 crisis -- including the new Consumer Financial Protection Bureau.

The CFPB is doing its job -- and our job is to defend the agency and to defend its work.

**The DSCC needs your support to counter the big banks and hold Senate Republicans accountable for gutting consumer protections. Contribute $1 now:**

[**http://www.dscc.org/working-families-before-wall-street**](http://action.dscc. "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/dscc-ewarren?refcode=DPE-20171030-Warren-ProsHV&recurring=auto&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&addr1= &city=&state=&zip=&phone=&employer=&occupation=&amounts=5,10,25,50,100,150,250&amount=5")

Thanks for being a part of this,

Elizabeth

disclaimer_text: Paid for by Van Hollen for US Senate
body:
**Senate: Republicans ' 2018 Prospects Erode **
_\- Cook Political Report_ This is the headline that greeted me when I arrived at my office ten days ago.

As Chair of the Democratic Senatorial Campaign Committee (DSCC), that was a pretty good start to my day.

_But the truth is: while polls are helpful, I don 't rely on polls. We are fighting to elect Senate Democrats in some tough battleground states in 2018, and we need to work hard every day if we want to take this country back._

[**We can 't afford to let up. That's why I'm reaching out to friends and supporters like you. Will you rush a donation before tomorrow's deadline to help me support Democrats running for the Senate in 2017 and 2018?**](http://action.vanhollen.org/page/m/2de91bb7/70cdc2ba/46b25f09/397d464/1391827469/VEsH/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/cvh-oct17?refcode=em103017&amount=25.00&recurring=auto&utm_medium=email&utm_source=cvanhollen&utm_content=1+-+We+canrsquot+afford+to+let+up+Thatrsquos&utm_campaign=em103017&source=em103017")

The retirements of Republican Senators Jeff Flake and Bob Corker in Arizona and Tennessee have opened up new possibilities for Democrats in these normally red states.

And in the December special election in Alabama, our extraordinary Democratic nominee, Doug Jones, is running a strong, competitive campaign against the alt-right candidate, extremist Roy Moore, and Democrats have the best chance for a political upset in a quarter-century.

In state after state, there are tight Senate races, and I'm working hard to make sure every race has the resources needed for Democrats to compete --AND WIN.

[**But I can 't do it without you. With so much at stake, will you pitch in immediately to help?**](http://action.vanhollen.org/page/m/2de91bb7/70cdc2ba/46b25f09/397d465/1391827469/VEsE/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/cvh-oct17?refcode=em103017&amount=25.00&recurring=auto&utm_medium=email&utm_source=cvanhollen&utm_content=2+-+But+I+canrsquot+do+it+without+you+With+s&utm_campaign=em103017&source=em103017")

Thank you for your help and support!

Chris

subject: The Democrats' strategy:

body:
Here it is, Friend, the Democrats' strategy for retaking the House in 2018:
**
Obstruct, obstruct, obstruct.**

That's all there is to it.****[**Put an end to Democrats ' petty political games >>>**](http://links.targetedvictory.mkt5241.com/ctt?kn=3&ms=MzEzMTQwNjAS1&r=NDY4NTQ0MTA2ODI1S0&b=0&j=MTE0MzkyMzc2MQS2&mt=1&rt=0)

You see, Democratic insiders have one goal: to block our conservative agenda. Why? So Republicans look like they can't get anything done. What for? To pave the way for Democrats to retake the House in 2018.

So that's just what they're doing -- obstructing. Even Politico reported on it:

_" House Minority Leader Nancy Pelosi (D-Calif.) is convinced another GOP crash-and-burn would likely hand Democrats the House next year, so there's no political upside to playing ball."_

name: Russ Feingold, LegitAction
subject: Progress despite Washington
body:
[ Legit ]LegitAction

Friend,

I founded LegitAction because the legitimacy of our democracy is under
assault -- but we can make a lot of progress when we work together,
even without allies controlling the White House or Congress.

Here’s some of what we’ve done together just in October:

* Calls from Legit members helped push California Governor Jerry
Brown to sign the historic California DISCLOSE Act and lead the
nation in dark money disclosure.
* Legit members in Florida helped rally their neighbors to add the
Voting Restoration Amendment to the 2018 state ballot.
* One of the most prominent Democrats who Legit members have been
telling to step down from the sham Trump-Pence election commission
admitted he doesn’t think it’s operating honestly and
transparently.

That’s a lot of progress for one month -- and we can keep it going.
But first we need to hit our financial goal for October, and we’re
still $8,780 short.

[ https://act.legitaction.com/go/1824?t=1002&akid=360%2E356062%2Em6Qy5j ]Help meet LegitAction’s October financial goal. Make a contribution
of $3 before
the month ends tomorrow. We only need to raise another $8,780.

The progress we made in October shows what we can do when we stay
united and push hard. All this progress might not take place in
Washington, but I can guarantee you 100% of it moves our country
forward.

And make no mistake, despite the progress, we need to keep moving
forward. The sham Trump-Pence election commission isn’t dead yet. An
illegitimate justice who never should have been on the Supreme Court
could rule to uphold hyperpartisan gerrymandering. We can help more
states move toward the National Popular Vote Interstate Compact. And
more.

We’ll continue to move forward everywhere we can, but hitting our
monthly goal before October ends is crucially important.

[ https://act.legitaction.com/go/1824?t=1003&akid=360%2E356062%2Em6Qy5j ]Make a contribution of $3 today to help meet LegitAction’s
October financial goal before the deadline.

Whether it’s making calls, rallying neighbors, or demanding
accountability, every month we’re growing a little bit stronger. I’m
glad you’re a part of it.

Thank you for standing up for democratic legitimacy today,

Russ Feingold
LegitAction

[ https://act.legitaction.com/go/1824?t=1004&akid=360%2E356062%2Em6Qy5j ]CONTRIBUTE »

name: Jenna Kruse, EMILY's List
subject: Remember the last constitutional convention?
body:
We elect pro-choice Democratic women who will fight for women and families. | [ ](https://secure.emilyslist.org/page/m/118c63a7/24c69fd9/17898a0e4/189feea7/1303854851/VEsH/ "https://secure.emilyslist.org/page/contribute/donate-to-emily?utm_medium=email&utm_source=emilyslist&utm_content=1+-+%0D%0A++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++&utm_campaign=WQEFEJ62N_digital_email_20171030_ConConThisIsReal_inact&source=WQEFEJ62N_digital_email_20171030_ConConThisIsReal_inact")
---

Peter,

Remember the last constitutional convention?

Yeah, me neither, because that was in 1787, when the founding fathers literally wrote the Constitution. It was the _**first and only**_ constitutional convention in our nation's history.

But now, Republicans want to do it again. Only this time, Mitch McConnell, Paul Ryan, and Donald Trump could be the ones running the show.

They're dangerously close to making it happen. The GOP completely controls 32 state legislatures, and they only need 34 to call a convention.

**[Donate $3 now to help reach our $125,000 End-of-Month goal so we can flip state chambers from red to blue and stop Republicans from threatening our democracy.](https://secure.emilyslist.org/page/m/118c63a7/24c69fd9/17898a0e4/189feea0/1303854851/VEsE/ "https://secure.emilyslist.org/page/contribute/20171028_email_OctoberEOM?utm_medium=email&utm_source=emilyslist&utm_content=2+-+Donate+3+now+to+help+reach+our+125000+En&utm_campaign=WQEFEJ62N_digital_email_20171030_ConConThisIsReal_inact&source=WQEFEJ62N_digital_email_20171030_ConConThisIsReal_inact")**

As unreal as it seems, Republicans are already practicing! They've held mock conventions in Virginia and Arizona so that they'll know exactly what to do once they control enough states to call for a convention _**without a single Democratic vote.**_
